incorrects.description: Student set container count to 3, reversed the values (first or second attempt)

steps.text: You put in the 3. But 2 GROUPS means 2 bags. How many bags do you need?

incorrects.description: Student set container count to any value other than 2 or 3 on first attempt

steps.text: Look at the words. How many GROUPS?

incorrects.description: Student set container count to any value other than 2 or 3 on second attempt

params.description: The phrase '2 groups' highlights in the instruction.

steps.text: 2 groups of 3. The first number tells you the groups. That's how many bags you make. Set it to 2.

incorrects.description: Student set container count incorrectly three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: System sets container count to 2. Two bags appear on screen, one at a time.

steps.text: Let me show you. 2 groups of 3. I start with the groups. That's the first number: 2. So I make 2 bags. The number of groups is how many containers you create.

incorrects.description: Student set items per container to 2, reversed the values (first or second attempt)

params.description: 2 items appear in each of the 2 bags.

steps.text: That's how many bags you have. Look inside ONE bag. How many items should be in each?

incorrects.description: Student set items per container to any value other than 3 or 2 on first attempt

steps.text: How many go IN EACH group?

incorrects.description: Student set items per container to any value other than 3 or 2 on second attempt

params.description: The phrase 'of 3' highlights in the instruction.

steps.text: 2 groups OF 3. The second number tells you what goes inside each bag. Put 3 in each one.

incorrects.description: Student set items per container incorrectly three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: System fills each bag with 3 items. Items appear one at a time in each bag until all bags contain 3.

steps.text: Here's how it works. I already have my 2 bags. Now I look at the second number: 3. That tells me how many go inside EACH bag. So I put 3 items in this bag, and 3 items in this bag. The second number is what goes in each group.
